Masih Imtiaz, CEO of Imtiaz Developments, is reshaping Dubai’s skyline with a blend of clarity, conviction, and discipline.

From working with Zaha Hadid Architects to reimagining waterfront living, sustainability, and lifestyle-driven spaces, his approach goes beyond real estate — it’s about building for impact and longevity.

Swipe through for a preview of his journey, and read the full cover story in CEO Middle East. Link in bio.
